scope: operational note plus machine-readable input contract
goal: Classify every forward-model field as setup input, calibrated parameter, validation target, or diagnostic-only CFD evidence
success_criteria: reviewed table accepted; no runtime path uses validation targets

scope: repo-local or Fluid branch forward-v0 runner and tests
goal: Run pressure-rooted 1D forward mode with heater input and imposed cooler duty; output mdot and sensors
success_criteria: mdot solved, no CFD mdot runtime input, outputs score mdot/T sensors against validation only

scope: cooler/HX UA or epsilon-NTU fit package
goal: Replace imposed cooler duty with low-dimensional predictive HX parameterization
success_criteria: training rows reduce cooler residual and held-out rows are reported without refit

goal: Implement eta_heater and test-section source-plus-loss representation
success_criteria: section heat comparison improves without per-case source hacks

scope: wall/shell/bulk thermal extraction and E0/E1/E2 replay
goal: Extract T_mix_signed/T_fwd_bulk/T_path_bulk/T_wall_inner/T_wall_shell/T_ext_drive and test wall-layer drive mappings
success_criteria: E1 or E2 explains N2 overcooling with section-family parameters only

goal: Quantify mdot predictivity using pressure-only fit-safe rows before thermal claims
success_criteria: mdot residuals and pressure residuals reported with fit-safe flags

goal: Resolve thermal mesh uncertainty for h/Nu/UA candidate rows
success_criteria: at least one thermal QOI has documented mesh/time uncertainty or remains explicitly blocked

scope: sensor location contract and station mapping note
goal: Confirm or bound TP/TW sensor coordinates and map to 1D path positions
success_criteria: sensor comparisons label coordinate uncertainty and do not hide energy residuals

goal: Define which Salt/corrected-Q/low-heat rows train, validate, or remain blocked
success_criteria: held-out rows exist before any fitted thermal correction is called predictive

goal: Run the final selected model in predictive mode and score mdot, branch heat, Tmean, loop delta, TP/TW
success_criteria: one table separates training vs heldout, uncertainty, and residual attribution
